sections.heading:
AI That Works For You,
Not Against You.
sections.subheading: Deploy safe, secure AI agents in minutes. No engineering team needed. Works the way your business actually works — whether you're an accounting firm, law practice, or any other professional service.

sections.heading: Why Choose OpenClaw Agents
sections.subheading: Built for businesses that demand reliability.

items.title: Instant & Secure Deployment
items.description: Launch AI agents in sandboxed containers in seconds. Enterprise-grade security without the complexity. Your data stays safe. Your workflows stay protected.

items.title: Real Business Results
items.description: Automate the work that eats your time. Save hours every week. Cut costs immediately. Your team focuses on what matters — building client relationships, not doing busywork.

items.title: No AI Expertise Needed
items.description: Simple setup for traditional businesses. You don't need to understand AI. Just describe what you want automated. We handle the rest.

sections.heading: Trusted by Professional Firms
sections.subheading: Real results from accountants, lawyers, and consultants.

items.quote: We automated document review. What used to take our team 3 days now happens overnight. Freed up two people for billable work.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Client intake is now automated. We get cleaner data, faster responses, and our team isn't buried in paperwork anymore.
items.author: Michael Torres

items.quote: The security and reliability matter more than anything else. We know our client data is protected. That's non-negotiable in our business.
items.author: Jennifer Wu

sections.heading: Transform Your Firm in 30 Days
sections.description: Join 200+ firms already saving 20+ hours per week with OpenClaw. Enterprise security, zero setup friction. First agent is free. No credit card required.

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: Most firms go live in 2-3 weeks. We handle deployment, security hardening, and team training. Your team just describes what to automate, and we do the rest. Zero engineering required.

items.question: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
items.answer: Our agents are deterministic — they only do exactly what you tell them to do. Built-in safeguards, comprehensive audit logs, and human-in-the-loop controls mean you're always in charge. No surprises, no hallucinations.

items.question: Can you handle my firm's specific workflows?
items.answer: Yes. We've automated intake for law firms, compliance for CPAs, scheduling for consultants, and everything in between. If your team does it repetitively, we can automate it. Custom workflows are our specialty.

items.question: What about data privacy and compliance?
items.answer: Your data never leaves your environment. Air-gapped containers, SOC 2 certification, HIPAA-ready infrastructure, and 256-bit encryption. We audit every transaction. Security is non-negotiable.

items.question: What's the ROI timeline?
items.answer: Firms average ROI in 6-8 weeks. Most save 20-30 hours per week. That's 1,000+ billable hours recovered annually per firm. At even $250/hour, that's $250K in recovered revenue.
